violations.text: Sauteed onions were observed held at 70 degrees Fahrenheit at the grill line in ambient temperature. Per PIC, food was placed at the line 2 hours prior to inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food moved to blast chiller to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025

The antimicrobial fruit and veggie wash solution was in excess of the 1:70-1:128 dilution ratio. A fruit and veggie wash solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. A maintenance request was made at the time of inspection. Technician arrived while inspector was on-site. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Deli meat was placed in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep and overfilled in the flip top prep unit. Food moved into the blast chiller to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
Bottle cleaners were observed in the hand-washing sink in the bar. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

Raw animal foods (such as raw meat) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked chicken wings) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

Milk and other items were observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit in the 2nd floor waiters station lowboy refrigeration unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items were voluntarily disposed of by PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

The door to the outside, located in the 1st floor back area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2024

Multiple tongs were observed stored hanging on the side of the cooking equipment. Utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. PIC moved utensils to designated area at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: 1) The blade of the slicer was observed to be chipped 2) The lowboy in the 2nd floor waitress station was observed not maintaining a proper ambient temperature. Both items taken out of service at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Items were disposed of by PIC at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and the mixer bowl have an accumulation of food debris and biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

An under the counter refrigeration unit located in the kitchen area was in poor repair (not holding adequate ambient temperature).Establishment has adequate refrigeration for food storage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2023
Several hand sinks located in restrooms throughout the establishment and in one service station were not dispensing hot or cold water. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023
An under the counter refrigeration unit located in the kitchen area was in poor repair (not holding adequate ambient temperature). New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023

The following plumbing was observed in poor repair or improper adjustment: 1) The plumbing under two ice machines were not adequately draining into air gap/floor drains 2) The plumbing under the hand sink of a restroom located on the third floor was observed leaking New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023
